text:
laszlof     2006-11-11 13:55:05 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    .                    modules 
    security             Makefile 
  Added files:
    security/osslsigncode Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    security/osslsigncode/files patch-osslsigncode.c 
  Log:
  New Port: security/osslsigncode
  
  Platform-independent tool for Authenticode signing of EXE/CAB files - uses
  OpenSSL and libcurl. It also supports timestamping.
  
  PR:     ports/105353
  Submitted By:   Nick Barkas <snb@threerings.net>
  Approved By:    flz (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.16592   +1 -0      CVSROOT/modules
  1.834     +1 -0      ports/security/Makefile
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/security/osslsigncode/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/security/osslsigncode/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +15 -0     ports/security/osslsigncode/files/patch-osslsigncode.c (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/security/osslsigncode/pkg-descr (new)
